app.title: Sub Creator
gallery.empty: No MOGRT found for this filter.
visual.title: Visual editor for selected MOGRT clips
visual.description: Select one or more Sub Creator MOGRT clips in timeline, read available properties, then apply your changes.
visual.noProperties: No editable properties detected on the current selection.
help.whisper: Whisper must be installed locally (either `whisper` CLI or Python `whisper` module).
help.tracks: MOGRT subtitles are automatically inserted on a new top video track.
update.downloadNotice: New version available (v{latest}, installed v{current}). Click to download.
error.missingSrtPath: Select an SRT file using Browse.
error.emptySrt: The SRT file contains no valid subtitle cues.
error.missingWhisperAudio: Select an audio/video file for Whisper.
error.emptyWhisper: Whisper did not return usable subtitles.
error.mogrtCatalogMissing: MOGRT catalog missing. Run npm run subcreator:build and reinstall the extension.
